---
title: "Projects"
output: distill::distill_article
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

### Research Funding / Scholarships


**2020 - 2024**

Queensland Academy of Sport (QAS) (Team Member). *How does Plantar Fasciopathy Manifest in Athletes?*


**2018 - 2021**

QUT - Mater Hospital Scholarship (PhD project).
*Placental Elasticity Distributions in Normal, Growth Restricted and Pre-Eclamptic Pregnancies*.

**2018 - 2020**

Australian Sonographer Accreditation Registry (Team Member) *What are the Observable Behaviours, Knowledge, Skill and Attitudes that Should be Demonstrated by Sonographers?*

**2019**

CAHRLI - Collaborative for Allied Health Research, Learning and Innovation Scholarship (Recipient) Metro North Hospital and Health Service. 

**2016 - 2018**

Wound Management Innovation Cooperative Research Centre - CRC Research Grant (Team Member).
*Clinical Trial EXTREME Pressure 2 Study*
